message:
feat(engine): integrate SnapshotFastPath into adversarial_campaign, module_cache, and governance_audit_ledger

Wires the new seqlock_fastpath module into three major subsystems so that
hot-path snapshot reads avoid full clone overhead when a recent published
snapshot is available.

lib.rs:
- Add `extern crate self as frankenengine_engine` for cross-module
  crate-internal imports used by the seqlock_fastpath integration
- Register seqlock_candidate_inventory and seqlock_fastpath as public modules

adversarial_campaign.rs (GuardplaneCalibrationState):
- Add SnapshotFastPath<CalibrationSnapshot> field with serde(skip) and
  default factory guardplane_snapshot_fastpath() using RetryBudgetPolicy(3,1)
- Split snapshot() into baseline_snapshot() (full clone) and snapshot()
  (fast-path read with fallback)
- Add refresh_snapshot_fastpath() called after every ensure_defaults() and
  after RedBlueLoopIntegrator calibration updates
- Expose snapshot_fastpath_policy() and snapshot_fastpath_telemetry() for
  operator observability
- New test: guardplane_calibration_state_fastpath_tracks_refresh_and_reads

module_cache.rs (ModuleCache):
- Add SnapshotFastPath<CacheSnapshot> with RetryBudgetPolicy(2,2)
- Replace derive(Default) with manual Default impl to initialize fastpath
- Split snapshot() into baseline_snapshot() + fast-path read
- Call publish_snapshot_fastpath() after every cache mutation (insert,
  invalidate_source, invalidate_policy, invalidate_trust_revocation,
  restore_trust, merge_snapshot)
- Expose snapshot_fastpath_policy() and snapshot_fastpath_telemetry()

governance_audit_ledger.rs (GovernanceAuditLedger):
- Add GovernanceLedgerHeadView struct for entries + latest_checkpoint
- Add SnapshotFastPath<GovernanceLedgerHeadView> with RetryBudgetPolicy(4,1)
- query() now reads from fast-path instead of iterating entries directly
- Add latest_checkpoint_view() as fast-path alternative to latest_checkpoint()
- Publish head view after every record_decision()
- Expose head_view_fastpath_policy() and head_view_fastpath_telemetry()

seqlock_fastpath.rs:
- Minor working-tree fixup (2-line delta from staged version)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
